title: Mobile application for the diagnosis and rehabilitation of facial and gait disorders
description: This project focuses on the development of a mobile application aimed at diagnosing and rehabilitating facial and gait disorders. It integrates advanced diagnostic tools and rehabilitation techniques to assist patients and healthcare professionals.

creators.name: Jan Kohout
creators.affiliation: Vysoká škola chemicko-technologická v Praze, Ústav matematiky, informatiky a kybernetiky, Technická 5, 166 28 Praha 6, Česká republika

notes: Funded by the Czech Health Research Council (Agentura pro zdravotnický výzkum ČR, AZV ČR), grant no. NW26-06-00464: 'Diagnosis and comprehensive treatment of facial nerve dysfunction using an advanced AI-based platform for facial and sensory (taste) analysis'. OpenAIRE funder ID for AZV ČR is 00k4n6c32 (source: OpenAIRE funder registry, https://api.openaire.eu/funders).
access_conditions: Source code is confidential. Access to the full repository is restricted to project members.
